# AL Mughal Constructions

> AL-MUGHAL CONSTRUCTIONS LTD — UK-based construction company serving Bradford, Leeds, West Yorkshire and across England.

## Business Summary

AL Mughal Constructions is a fully insured general contractor and home & construction business based at 162 Lilycroft Road, Bradford, BD9 5AE, United Kingdom. We provide domestic and commercial building services across Bradford, Leeds, West Yorkshire and Yorkshire.

## Location

- Country: United Kingdom (England)
- Region: West Yorkshire
- City: Bradford
- Postcode: BD9 5AE
- Address: 162 Lilycroft Road, Bradford, BD9 5AE, United Kingdom
- Service areas: Bradford, Leeds, West Yorkshire, Yorkshire, England, UK

## Contact

- Phone: 07379 484100, 07775 934100
- Email: sales@almughalconstructions.co.uk
- Website: https://www.almughalconstructions.co.uk

## Services

- New House Construction
- House Extensions
- Loft Conversions
- Property Renovations
- Bathroom Renovations
- Kitchen Renovations
- Roofing Services
- Brickwork & Masonry
- Driveways & Paving
- Landscaping & Gardens
- Commercial Construction
- Structural Repairs

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Where is AL Mughal Constructions based?**
162 Lilycroft Road, Bradford, BD9 5AE, United Kingdom.

**What areas do you cover?**
Bradford, Leeds, West Yorkshire, Yorkshire and surrounding areas in England, UK.

**Do you offer ECO grants?**
Yes. Free ECO grants quotes are available for eligible UK property improvement projects.

**How do I get a quote?**
Call 07379 484100 or 07775 934100, email sales@almughalconstructions.co.uk, or use the contact form at https://www.almughalconstructions.co.uk/#contact

- Fully insured UK construction company
- Free quotes and no-obligation site visits

- ECO grants available
- Based in Bradford, serving Leeds and West Yorkshire
